import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { FaSave, FaTelegram, FaWhatsapp, FaRobot, FaUserCog } from 'react-icons/fa'; const SettingsPage = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('business'); const [settings, setSettings] = useState({ businessName: 'AI Support Agency', email: 'support@aisupport.com', phone: '+1 234 567 8900', industry: 'technology', autoReply: true, leadCollection: true, telegramBot: '', telegramEnabled: false, whatsappNumber: '', whatsappEnabled: false, aiModel: 'gpt-3.5-turbo', aiTemperature: 0.7, }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, value, type, checked } = e.target; setSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: type === 'checkbox' ? checked : value })); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); alert('Settings saved successfully!'); }; return (
